45378427.title: Mick Duncan
45378427.extract: Michael Gordon Duncan (born 8 August 1947) is a former New Zealand rugby union player. A centre and second five-eighth, Duncan represented Hawke's Bay at a provincial level, and was a member of the New Zealand national side, the All Blacks, in 1971. He played two matches for the All Blacks, both of them internationals against the touring British Lions.
